---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement for shelters, guests, or staff
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## What should be improved?

Describe the feature or workflow.

## Who benefits?

- [ ] Guests
- [ ] Front desk staff
- [ ] Case managers
- [ ] Administrators
- [ ] Volunteers
- [ ] Other

## Why does it matter?

Explain the practical shelter need this solves.

## Raspberry Pi impact

Could this add heavy dependencies, background work, or slow screens?

## Privacy impact

Would this collect or display any new personal information?
